# Third-party components

Files in this directory are redistributed third-party software. They are NOT
covered by the PolyTechniques proprietary license in the repository root and
remain under their own licenses.

## RDKit (RDKit_minimal.js, RDKit_minimal.wasm)

The RDKit cheminformatics engine, JavaScript/WebAssembly distribution
(@rdkit/rdkit), used for structure matching in Polymer Search.

- Project: https://www.rdkit.org / https://github.com/rdkit/rdkit
- License: BSD 3-Clause
- Copyright (c) 2006-2025, Rational Discovery LLC, Greg Landrum, and the
  RDKit contributors. All rights reserved.

Redistribution and use in source and binary forms, with or without
modification, are permitted provided that the conditions of the BSD
3-Clause license are met. See https://github.com/rdkit/rdkit/blob/master/license.txt
for the full license text.
